author: Sheldon
name: SWA + BigramHash(10240) + SmearGate + Int5MLP + MuonWD(0.04) + zstd-22
blurb: Submission-style code snapshot for the March 21 branch that layers SWA, BigramHash embeddings, SmearGate, mixed int5/int6 quantization, Muon weight decay, and zstd compression on top of the earlier int6/QAT stack. Metrics are intentionally left null because no verified H100 train log is checked in with this folder yet.
